action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline MLP (3 epochs) achieved ic_mean=0.0153, val_ic~0.038. Training is fast (~22s/epoch). Analysis: MLP is underfitting or not optimal for tabular Alpha158; tree ensembles (LightGBM) typically dominate this benchmark. Decision: Keep MLP checkpoint but train a LightGBM model, which should yield much higher IC. Also generalize predict.py to auto-detect LGB vs MLP checkpoint.
action.command: python train_lgb.py && python predict.py --data_path local_test_eval --checkpoint checkpoints --output local_test_eval/output.json
